summary: Backend regression re-run after config-only change that re-added `--tunnel` to the Expo supervisor command AND installed @expo/ngrok@^4.1.0 as devDependency. Full 51-test regression suite (33 iteration_8 email-OTP + 18 iteration_9 today/tomorrow) PASSED 100% in 179.58s. Preview URL healthy: GET https://meal-planning-hub-2.preview.emergentagent.com/api/ → 200 {app:'MessMate', status:'ok'}. Supervisor: backend RUNNING, expo RUNNING (uptime >3min, no restart loop), mongodb RUNNING. No backend regressions introduced by the supervisor/frontend config change — as expected (backend/server.py was not touched).

minor.issue: Passlib DeprecationWarning: `crypt` module deprecated in Python 3.13. Cosmetic only; bcrypt hashing works and all 51 tests pass. Pre-existing, unrelated to this change.

critical_code_review_comments: /etc/supervisor/conf.d/supervisord.conf: expo command is now `yarn expo start --tunnel --port 3000` — works because @expo/ngrok@^4.1.0 is present in /app/frontend/package.json devDependencies. Contrast with iteration_10 where --tunnel was added without the ngrok binary and Metro crash-looped.
Backend server.py unchanged from iteration_9/10/11 (still ~1968 lines — the >700-line split guideline still stands as prior tech-debt; out of scope for this iteration).
seed_data_creation: None. Reused existing self-cleaning TEST_-prefixed suites.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 12 is a config-only verification of a tunnel restore. Change set: (a) devDependency @expo/ngrok@^4.1.0 added to /app/frontend/package.json; (b) supervisor expo command restored to `yarn expo start --tunnel --port 3000`. Backend was not touched. All 51 regression tests green. SMTP is live for OTP tests (real Gmail App Password) — consider OTP_DEV_MODE for CI to avoid mailbox pollution. Public URL env var is EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL.
rca_of_issue: No new issue in this iteration. Historical context: iteration_10 broke Metro by enabling --tunnel without @expo/ngrok binary → supervisor restart loop → K8s ingress 502. Iteration_11 reverted --tunnel to stabilize. Iteration_12 re-enables --tunnel now that @expo/ngrok is installed; supervisor status confirms Metro stays up and preview URL returns 200 for /api/. Backend regression suite unaffected.
